name: Faux's Starting Route
author: Faux
description: ~2,500+ points routed. Relics: Animal wrangler (pooner), Dodgy deals. Can be done with any relics, but slight adjustments may need to be made.

sections.name: Lumbridge Start
sections.description: Tutorial, early skills, and initial Lumbridge tasks

customItem.label: Basement
customItem.description: Go down ladder in Cook's room - change attack style to kick

items.note: Spider is in the basement. Use kick style for the task, then switch back after.

customItem.label: Prayer
customItem.description: Turn on Thick Skin prayer (drain to 0 prayer points for later)

customItem.label: Sell
customItem.description: Sell bronze sword, dagger, shield, bow, net, body runes at general store. Buy knife

customItem.label: Buy
customItem.description: Buy 1 beer at the bar east of general store
Pick 1 wheat

sections.name: Draynor Village / Lumbridge Return / Karamja / Fishing & Cooking / Varrock
sections.description: Aggie, agility course, Vampire Slayer start | Prayer, Bob's quest, Death's domain, Stronghold of Security | Pineapple, Shilo Village setup, Duradel | Fish at Lumbridge, cook pike, train firemaking | Gertrude's cat, rune shop, Daddy's Home, thieving, combat

customItem.description: Run to Aggie in Draynor Village

customItem.label: Quest
customItem.description: Start Vampire Slayer, get garlic upstairs

customItem.label: Bank
customItem.description: Deposit all. Withdraw coins, mind/air runes, beer. Buy 25 wines, deposit 10

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy 4 barley seeds

customItem.label: Teleport
customItem.description: Home teleport
Talk to Count Check, tele to Stronghold of Security

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy steel full helm in Barbarian Village

customItem.label: Teleport
customItem.description: League menu teleport to Karamja
Take Hajedy's cart to Shilo Village

customItem.label: Bank
customItem.description: Deposit all, withdraw coins and tinderbox

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy torch from general store, light and drop. Buy 35 bronze bars

customItem.label: Bank
customItem.description: Deposit all. Withdraw harpoon, coins

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy 1 bait pack, 2 feather packs from Fernahei

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy enchanted gem from Duradel, get slayer task

customItem.label: Teleport
customItem.description: Home teleport

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy steel axe from Bob

customItem.label: Fishing
customItem.description: Run north to river fishing spot (east across bridge)

customItem.label: Bank
customItem.description: Deposit all. Withdraw egg, milk, flour, raw pike, bronze/steel axe, tinderbox

customItem.label: Quest
customItem.description: Turn in Cook's Assistant, cook pike on range

customItem.label: Woodcutting
customItem.description: Chop/burn logs to 15 FM. Drop bronze axe after level 6. Keep 2 regular logs

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Run northwest to Gertrude, buy cat
Shoo away kitten

customItem.label: Bank
customItem.description: Deposit tinderbox, withdraw pickaxe, 1 wine

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy staff of air, equip it

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy hammer and 4 buckets in general store. Fill 3 with water. Deposit hammer, buckets

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy 2 mind packs, 1 earth, 1 water, 1 fire pack, 15 chaos runes from Aubury

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy blue wizard hat, pink skirt, yellow cape. Equip skirt/cape

customItem.label: Quest
customItem.description: Start Daddy's Home, speak to Yarlo

customItem.label: Woodcutting
customItem.description: Remove all furniture, speak to Yarlo, search crate for waxwood logs

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Run to sawmill (cut 10 trees on the way). Make 10 planks, buy 5 bolts of cloth, saw, 50 steel nails

customItem.label: Quest
customItem.description: Build everything in Yarlo's house, speak to Yarlo, speak to Marlo to finish Daddy's Home

customItem.label: Bank
customItem.description: Open crate, bank all. Withdraw pickaxe, steel axe, barley seeds, coins, mind, water, fire, 7 wines, tele tab, chaos runes

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Buy iron dagger from weapon shop, equip then drop

customItem.label: Quest
customItem.description: Continue Vampire Slayer until you get the stake

customItem.label: Mining
customItem.description: Mine 3 clay to the southwest

customItem.label: Mining
customItem.description: Pick 3 redberries. Mine 5 tin, 1 copper. Drop 4 tin

customItem.label: Shop
customItem.description: Run south to hops patch. Buy rake, seed dibber, 4 compost from farmer. Use compost, rake, plant barley, protect

customItem.description: Run to Brimhaven agility course, tag flashing pillar for 1 ticket

customItem.description: Go to Karamja volcano, down the rope, run west
Run east into TzHaar city

Unlock clue compass relic

sections.name: Shield of Arrav & Prayer (Optional)
sections.description: Optional: Shield of Arrav for prayer XP lamps

customItem.description: Find a partner for Shield of Arrav (if you want 43 prayer)

customItem.label: Quest
customItem.description: After Shield of Arrav, talk to Historian Minas upstairs in Varrock museum for 1k+5k XP lamps (8k+40k at 8x). Use on prayer

customItem.label: Mining
customItem.description: Clean finds until 51+ kudos. Speak with information clerk NW for 8k mining XP
